metadata.harness: maintainer-only OpenClerk embedded runtime maturity harness; reduced reports only

corpus.counting_policy: Counts are derived from runner-visible document summaries and metadata; reduced reports do not include document paths, titles, snippets, or private roots.

import_sync.evidence_posture: reduced counters and timings only; excludes document paths, titles, snippets, raw content, database paths, vault roots, and machine-absolute paths

reopen_sync.evidence_posture: reduced counters and timings only; excludes document paths, titles, snippets, raw content, database paths, vault roots, and machine-absolute paths

read_probes.name: list-documents
read_probes.evidence_posture: runner-visible summaries counted without emitting paths or titles

read_probes.name: get-document
read_probes.evidence_posture: document body was read for timing only and is excluded from reduced reports

read_probes.name: fts-search
read_probes.evidence_posture: hit counts only; reduced report excludes snippets, paths, titles, doc ids, and chunk ids

read_probes.name: fts-search
read_probes.evidence_posture: hit counts only; reduced report excludes snippets, paths, titles, doc ids, and chunk ids

read_probes.name: fts-search
read_probes.evidence_posture: hit counts only; reduced report excludes snippets, paths, titles, doc ids, and chunk ids

read_probes.name: projection-synthesis-sample
read_probes.evidence_posture: projection freshness count only; reduced report excludes projection refs

read_probes.name: provenance-sample
read_probes.evidence_posture: provenance event count only; reduced report excludes source refs and event ids

checks.boundary: This harness validates local runtime behavior and reduced-report hygiene; routine-agent bypass checks require an agent eval row with event logs.

outcomes.name: reduced-report-boundary
outcomes.evidence_posture: repo-relative or neutral artifact references only; raw content and raw logs are not committed
outcomes.details: Report intentionally excludes document paths, titles, snippets, private vault roots, and machine-absolute run roots.

outcomes.name: runtime-maturity-readiness
outcomes.evidence_posture: SQLite FTS, list/get, projection, and provenance probes executed through embedded OpenClerk runtime APIs.
outcomes.details: Use these numbers as decision input only; promotion decisions still need safety, capability, UX, performance, and evidence posture recorded separately.
